title: ExtendedChangelog
description: Extended changelog schema for Visusta ESG regulatory intelligence reports

generated_date.description: ISO 8601 date when this report was generated

previous_period.description: Year-month of the prior screening period

client_context.description: Client-specific contextual metadata for personalising the report

executive_summary.description: 2-3 paragraphs of analytical prose summarising key regulatory developments

sections.description: Ordered list of report sections, each covering one regulation or theme

impact_summary_table.description: Top-level summary table listing all regulations, effects, dates, and action owners

references.description: Bibliographic references cited in this report

topic_change_statuses.description: Per-topic change flags keyed by topic slug

status_changes.description: Regulations whose status changed this period

content_updates.description: Non-status content changes to tracked regulations

critical_actions.description: High-priority action items surfaced by this screening cycle

confidence_scores.description: Per-section confidence scores produced by the generation agent (0.0-1.0)

approval_state.description: Human approval workflow state for this report

at.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the approval action

agent_log.description: Ordered log of agent actions taken during generation

total_regulations_tracked.description: Total number of regulations tracked this period

total_changes_detected.description: Total number of changes detected this period

Section.description: A self-contained report section covering one regulation or theme

heading.description: Section heading (regulation name and key provision)

table.description: Optional structured data table within this section

callout.description: Optional highlighted callout box text (action required, deadline, etc.)

chart_ref.description: Optional reference key for a chart asset to embed

evidence_refs.description: Optional list of evidence IDs that back this section

Table.description: A structured table with headers and data rows

rows.description: Data rows; each row is an array of cell values matching headers length

access_date.description: ISO 8601 date the source was accessed

TopicChangeStatus.description: Change status for a single regulatory topic

changed_since_last.description: Whether any change was detected versus the previous period

level.description: Severity or status label of the detected change (e.g. critical, stable, amendment_in_progress)

changes_detected.description: Count of changes detected for this topic
